concept.summary: A real ChatGPT prompt becomes one persistent seed that Sequences converts into a storyboard, directed timeline, and finished launch film.

beats.purpose: Type the launch request in a real ChatGPT composer.
Send through the exact knot and release the green prompt seed toward Sequences.
Transform the single green seed into a six-arm spiral, reorganize it into five opaque scene cards, then route that same seed toward the timeline.
Morph the arriving seed into the timeline playhead, travel through five storyboard frames, and dock in the selected result card.
Expand the selected card into the playable result, invert, release five designed orbital modules on staccato attacks, and converge into the lockup line.
Collapse the player into the Sequences wordmark, period, promise, and ChatGPT provenance.

revision.notes: Measured cursor targets, one-object seed continuity, exact node/playhead/card morphs, redesigned five-card peak system, and a cue-synced SFX mix.
